quotes.text: 'Clean code' is just code that looks nice. But looking nice and being good are not the same thing at all.
quotes.author: Casey Muratori
quotes.source: Clean Code, Pair Programming, and Refactoring Debate, 2023

quotes.text: The best time to think about performance is never. The second best time is when users complain.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best time to add caching is when profiling tells you to. Not when you think it might help.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Every database query should have an index. Every index should have a reason. Every reason should be tested.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your SaaS should be fast. Not 'good enough' fast. Actually fast. Speed is a feature.
quotes.author: based
